meaning: n.埋葬学(一门研究古生物如何被埋葬而成为化石被保存下来的学科)
examples: Cutmarks were a kind of surface modification marks on bones and teeth(fossils), which were an important aspect of microscopic taphonomy research.
Experimental taphonomy is a multidisciplinary research on the processes of fossilization, which is involved in geology, biology, chemistry and physics.
